properties.action_apr18: Re-closed Hormuz, fired on Indian-flagged ships, called Araghchi 'idiot'

properties.status_apr18: Re-closed by IRGC within 24h of opening; returned to 'previous state'; ships fired upon; US blockade continues

properties.action_apr18: Blockade remains 'in full force'; accused Iran of blackmail; expects deal in '1-2 days'
Called 'idiot' by IRGC for opening Hormuz; opening reversed within 24h

properties.detail: IRGC declares Hormuz 'returned to previous state' under strict military control, reversing Araghchi's opening within 24 hours. Triggered by continued US blockade.

entities.name: IRGC Fires on Ships in Hormuz (Apr 18)

properties.detail: Iranian gunboats fired on at least 2-3 vessels including Indian-flagged VLCC Sanmar Herald despite prior clearance. UKMTO reported attacks. India summoned Iran ambassador.
properties.vessels: VLCC Sanmar Herald (Indian-flagged), at least one other Indian ship

properties.detail: Axios/CNN scoop: US considering unfreezing $20B in Iranian assets in exchange for surrender of enriched uranium stockpile. 3-page MoU under discussion. Some HEU shipped to third country, some down-blended under monitoring.
Secretary of State Rubio urged European countries to quickly reimpose sanctions on Iran, warning Iran violating agreement and nearing nuclear weapon capability
India's foreign ministry summoned Iran's ambassador over 'serious incident' of firing on two India-flagged merchant ships in Hormuz
IRGC called Araghchi an 'idiot' for opening Hormuz, then reversed his declaration within 24 hours. Most dramatic public display of hardliner-pragmatist split.
US offers $20B frozen assets release for Iran's enriched uranium. 3-page MoU. Options: HEU to third country or down-blend to 3% under monitoring. Supersedes 20-year moratorium demand.
Israel 'shocked' by Trump's PROHIBITED warning, demands explanation from White House. Netanyahu government questions whether Lebanon is even included in ceasefire.
Largely holding. Israeli bulldozers continue demolition in south. Shelling around Beit Lif, al-Qantara, Toul. Displaced Lebanese attempt to return. Israel maintains south occupied.

properties.action_apr18: Two Indian-flagged ships fired upon in Hormuz. Foreign ministry summoned Iran ambassador.
